title: CGC Canopy Growth Q8 2022 Earnings Analysis and Forecast
text: Canopy Growth Corporation Q8 2022 earnings analysis. The company continues its transformation journey focusing on path to profitability through aggressive cost reduction and strategic portfolio optimization. Key metrics tracked include adjusted EBITDA, free cash flow, and gross margins across key segments. Canada cannabis segment showing stabilization with medical products driving growth. Adult-use category facing margin pressures but demonstrating sequential improvement. International markets including Poland and Germany showing strong double-digit growth rates. Storz & Bickel vaporizer business remains bright spot with double-digit growth. Management guidance emphasizing disciplined capital allocation and focus on positive unit economics. Analyst expectations center on company achieving breakeven adjusted EBITDA within fiscal year. Risk factors include regulatory changes, competitive pressures, and macro headwinds. Opportunities exist in global medical cannabis expansion and premium product innovation.
